title: Verify a Multivariable Responsive System
summary: Build and verify responsive test matrix in inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain responsive test matrix from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply responsive test matrix without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves responsive test matrix when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix.
steps.why: Verify a Multivariable Responsive System makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix.

content.text: Responsive verification is a matrix, not three screenshots. Vary inline and block size, text zoom, browser zoom, content length and language, orientation, input mode, network and image selection, motion and contrast preferences, forced colors, print, and component containers. Record task outcomes and defects around boundaries so a visual success cannot hide clipping, unreachable focus, excess transfer, or lost meaning. Apply it to inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix.

options.text: Inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix case 6: keep the inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix defect because the happy path worked once.

Inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix case 6: a plausible success state is incomplete evidence. Test meaningful combinations and boundary neighbors, record observable task outcomes, and rerun the matrix after every repair.
Inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix case 6: replace the complete artifact before isolating the failed relationship.

checks.expected:
• Long translated content at narrow width and 200% zoom passes every task.
  • Keyboard, touch, coarse pointer, and hover-capable paths expose the same actions.
  • Image currentSrc, embed ratio, reduced motion, contrast, forced colors, print, and container placements are verified.

checks.description: Build the inventory responsive regression and evidence matrix layer preserves the boundary record requirement.
checks.failureMessage: Restore the boundary record requirement without deleting earlier valid work.
checks.expected: <!-- Boundary evidence: below, at, and above every content and container threshold. -->
